intent: Brief: 'large language models — architecture, capabilities, and failure modes'. (1) Wikipedia — 'Large language model' and 'Transformer (machine learning model)'. 5+ facts on the architecture and capability taxonomy. (2) Reddit /f/technology or /f/MachineLearning — 3+ posts on hallucination, prompt injection, or empirical use. Report must: summarise the architecture, list 3 canonical failure modes with Wikipedia citations, and map 2+ community observations to each. Cite.
